highlight.js vendored browser assets

- Version: 11.11.1
- Source: https://github.com/highlightjs/highlight.js
- CDN asset source: https://www.jsdelivr.com/package/npm/@highlightjs/cdn-assets
- License: BSD 3-Clause, see LICENSE in this directory

This directory is loaded locally by the Dashboard Products viewer. Do not replace
it with runtime CDN or Google-hosted assets.
